Name: MissionSystemMsgCommonParam
Description: Determines the parameters for player state reactions.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: 0: Playback Condition Flag ID
Fields.Description: The playback condition flag for this reaction.

Fields.Name: 0: Talk Param ID
Fields.Description: The conversation parameter ID to use.

Fields.Name: 1: Playback Condition Flag ID
Fields.Description: The playback condition flag for this reaction.

Fields.Name: 1: Talk Param ID
Fields.Description: The conversation parameter ID to use.

Fields.Name: 2: Playback Condition Flag ID
Fields.Description: The playback condition flag for this reaction.

Fields.Name: 2: Talk Param ID
Fields.Description: The conversation parameter ID to use.

Fields.Name: 3: Playback Condition Flag ID
Fields.Description: The playback condition flag for this reaction.

Fields.Name: 3: Talk Param ID
Fields.Description: The conversation parameter ID to use.

Fields.Name: 4: Playback Condition Flag ID
Fields.Description: The playback condition flag for this reaction.

Fields.Name: 4: Talk Param ID
Fields.Description: The conversation parameter ID to use.

Fields.Name: Reaction Limit
Fields.Description: The maximum number of instances of this reaction.

Fields.Name: Minimum Reaction Interval
Fields.Description: The minimum amount of time that must pass between repeats of this reaction. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Reaction Category Offset ID
Fields.Description: The offset ID to apply for this reaction. -1 means no interaction
